\tzpentry{ID3328}{Helix Energy Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3328 introduces Helix Energy Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{E}_{ \text{helix}}( \rho) = \sum_{j} K_j \rho K_j^ \dagger \end{equation}
